purpose: Goethe Theory of Colours chapter smoke — structural + observation matrix against book §§

results.goetheSaw: North-star dielectric ocean: Fresnel, Snell window, TIR trap/escape, and spectral caustics at the air–water interface (not a Goethe paragraph — physics baseline).
results.userShouldSee: Submerged checkerboard cube; realistic interface; Snell/TIR/cube framing; no fake bulk pigment.
results.caption: — — Dielectric interface path tracer
results.notes: Physics north-star; visual Goethe match N/A — structural + dielectric proof.
results.visualChecklist: Submerged checkerboard cube; realistic interface; Snell/TIR/cube framing; no fake bulk pigment.

results.quote: Light, darkness, and a colourless medium
results.goetheSaw: Light + darkness + a colourless semi-transparent medium produce colour; thickness of the medium modulates the appearance.
results.userShouldSee: Low sun through medium: warm near horizon / cool overhead relations; thickness changes colour; bulk water not blue paint at low opacity.
results.caption: §175 — Light, darkness, and a colourless medium
results.visualChecklist: Low sun through medium: warm near horizon / cool overhead relations; thickness changes colour; bulk water not blue paint at low opacity.

results.goetheSaw: Sky blue is darkness seen through thin illumined vapour; the sun through mist warms yellow→ruby.
results.userShouldSee: Zenith blue deepens with denser atmosphere / low sun; sun disk warms; optional flame-edge demo when sceneMode=2.
results.caption: §155 — Darkness seen through illumined vapour
results.visualChecklist: Zenith blue deepens with denser atmosphere / low sun; sun disk warms; optional flame-edge demo when sceneMode=2.

results.goetheSaw: Principal light tints the surface; contrary (fill) light fills the shadow → complementary coloured shadows.
results.userShouldSee: Dual-light rod/floor: two distinct coloured shadows; overlap darker/neutral; MIXED badge.
results.caption: §76 — Contrary light fills the shadow
results.visualChecklist: Dual-light rod/floor: two distinct coloured shadows; overlap darker/neutral; MIXED badge.

results.goetheSaw: Divers report a red-biased field with green-tending shadows under water.
results.userShouldSee: Underwater dual-light: warm lit faces, cooler/greener shadow regions on cube/floor.
results.caption: §78 — Divers: red field, green shadows
results.visualChecklist: Underwater dual-light: warm lit faces, cooler/greener shadow regions on cube/floor.

results.goetheSaw: White against a yellow field takes on a purple (physiological) tint at the boundary.
results.userShouldSee: Yellow/white split floor; purple fringe when physiological layer enabled; MIXED badge.
results.caption: §56 — White on yellow → purple tint
results.notes: Physiological fringe may need human eyes on PNG; structural badge + scene load required.
results.visualChecklist: Yellow/white split floor; purple fringe when physiological layer enabled; MIXED badge.

results.goetheSaw: At refracting boundaries, displacement of the image produces coloured fringes.
results.userShouldSee: Spectral edges / dispersion at water boundaries and cube silhouette; PHYSICAL badge.
results.caption: §227 — Displacement at boundaries produces colour
results.visualChecklist: Spectral edges / dispersion at water boundaries and cube silhouette; PHYSICAL badge.

results.quote: Separated reflections are weak and shadowy
results.goetheSaw: When surface reflections are separated (double reflection), secondary images appear weak and shadowy.
results.userShouldSee: Calm surface; secondary reflection path weaker than primary; PHYSICAL badge.
results.caption: §224 — Separated reflections are weak and shadowy
results.visualChecklist: Calm surface; secondary reflection path weaker than primary; PHYSICAL badge.

results.quote: Opponent colour floats on neutral ground
results.goetheSaw: After fixation on a colour, the opponent colour appears floating on a neutral ground (physiological).
results.userShouldSee: Fixation / opponent afterimage layer labeled PHYSIOLOGICAL (viewer); not smuggled into water radiance.
results.caption: §50 — Opponent colour floats on neutral ground
results.notes: Opponent afterimage is inherently visual/human; STILL freeze ok for structure. Review PNG for fixation plane; colour match not automatable.
results.visualChecklist: Fixation / opponent afterimage layer labeled PHYSIOLOGICAL (viewer); not smuggled into water radiance.

results.quote: Faint lights appear coloured at night
results.goetheSaw: At night / twilight, faint lights (moon, candle) appear distinctly coloured.
results.userShouldSee: Low ambient with moon/candle-style lights tinted; MIXED badge.
results.caption: §85 — Faint lights appear coloured at night
results.visualChecklist: Low ambient with moon/candle-style lights tinted; MIXED badge.

results.goetheSaw: Water itself has no colour; slight semi-opacity (not pigment) yields the dioptrical effects.
results.userShouldSee: Cube through colourless medium; no bulk blue pigment; PHYSICAL badge.
results.caption: §161 — Water deprived slightly of transparency
results.visualChecklist: Cube through colourless medium; no bulk blue pigment; PHYSICAL badge.

results.quote: Everything seen in red light; shadows green
results.goetheSaw: Underwater diver perspective: red-biased illumination field with green-tending shadows (§78).
results.userShouldSee: Underwater cube; beer-style absorption; red/green relations; MIXED badge.
results.caption: §78 — Everything seen in red light; shadows green
results.visualChecklist: Underwater cube; beer-style absorption; red/green relations; MIXED badge.

results.goetheSaw: Looking into a vessel of water, the bottom appears raised by refraction.
results.userShouldSee: Apparent elevation of submerged geometry / bottom plane; PHYSICAL badge.
results.caption: §187 — The bottom appears raised
results.visualChecklist: Apparent elevation of submerged geometry / bottom plane; PHYSICAL badge.

results.goetheSaw: On an agitated sea, lit faces and shadow sides show strong contrast (green-tending lit, opposite in shadow).
results.userShouldSee: Waves with clear lit/shadow contrast across slopes; MIXED badge.
results.caption: §57 — Lit side green; shadow opposite
results.visualChecklist: Waves with clear lit/shadow contrast across slopes; MIXED badge.

results.goetheSaw: At twilight the sea shows green-tending shadows under residual sky light.
results.userShouldSee: Low sun ocean; sea-green shadow tendency; MIXED badge.
results.caption: §75 — Sea-green shadows at twilight
results.visualChecklist: Low sun ocean; sea-green shadow tendency; MIXED badge.

results.quote: Halo around the sun image on water
results.goetheSaw: The reflected sun image on water is surrounded by a glittering halo / dazzle.
results.userShouldSee: Bright sun glitter path on surface with halo-like bloom or sparkle; MIXED badge.
results.caption: §93 — Halo around the sun image on water
results.visualChecklist: Bright sun glitter path on surface with halo-like bloom or sparkle; MIXED badge.
